Triple Whale attribution
Model
Window
Drives the Triple Whale banner rows, the TW reality-check, and the per-dimension TW columns. The Meta row is Meta\u2019s own attribution and does not change.
Triple Whale — Meta reality check (account level)
Date range
Filters (cross-filter the whole board)
Best / worst by Meta ROAS · min spend $ · excludes legacy
Breakdown dimension
Daily trends by
Daily spend by dimension (stacked)
Meta ROAS = Meta's own attributed revenue ÷ spend (Meta in-app attribution — under-reports vs Triple Whale; it's the only ROAS available per-creative, since TW is account-level). Meta CPA = spend ÷ Meta purchases. Spend in the tables is per-ad Meta spend. "—" = legacy/unparsed or no data · Legacy ads (old pipe format) only contribute Agency (via producer code) and are excluded from the Best/Worst cards but still counted in spend.
